zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：弱势震荡下的承压整理
zh.content:
当前XRP/USD维持窄幅震荡，价格1.1441运行于SMA20 1.15850下方，短线结构偏弱，整体处于均线压制状态，反弹动能不足，市场多空博弈但尚未形成有效突破方向。

技术指标方面，MACD处于-0.01224附近并维持负值运行，显示空头动能略占优势，趋势动能偏弱。RSI暂无数据，但结合价格贴近低位区间判断，短线仍存在继续下探压力。

支撑位关注1.1440一线及1.1400整数关口，若失守可能打开进一步下行空间。上方阻力集中在1.1585均线位置，其次为1.1650区域，需放量突破才能扭转弱势结构。

操作建议以反弹受阻后的顺势做空为主，若价格反抽至1.1585附近遇阻可分批布局空单，跌破1.1400则延续空头思路看向更低区间，同时需严格控制止损防止震荡反复。

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
XRP/USD is trading at 1.1441, remaining under pressure after slipping below its 20-period simple moving average at 1.1585. The price is currently hovering near the session low of 1.14409, indicating limited buying interest in the short term. As long as XRP remains beneath the SMA(20), the prevailing bias favors a mildly bearish to neutral outlook, with sellers maintaining control despite the relatively modest 24-hour decline.

Momentum indicators also suggest caution. The MACD reading of -0.0122 reflects negative momentum and indicates that bearish pressure continues to outweigh bullish conviction. While the signal line is unavailable, the negative MACD value alone points to weakening trend strength on the upside. The absence of a valid RSI reading limits confirmation, but current price behavior relative to the moving average reinforces the view that market sentiment remains subdued.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located around 1.1440, which aligns closely with the current session low. A decisive break below this area could expose further downside toward 1.1350 and potentially 1.1250. On the upside, initial resistance appears near 1.1500, followed by the more significant SMA(20) barrier at 1.1585. A sustained move above 1.1585 would improve the technical picture and could trigger renewed bullish interest toward the 1.1700 region.

Traders may consider a defensive approach while XRP remains below its moving average. Short-term bearish strategies could remain favorable on rallies into resistance zones, provided risk management is strictly observed. More conservative participants may prefer waiting for either a confirmed breakdown below 1.1440 or a recovery above 1.1585 before entering new positions. Given the compressed daily range and weakening momentum, patience may offer a better risk-to-reward profile than aggressive positioning at current levels.
